ModMetaData.name: Vaults n' Finance
ModMetaData.author: Starfoth + DimonSever000 + Nelson
ModMetaData.description:
Vaults; hoard your wealth in style
A simple mod that brings a simple concept; stacks of CA$H and gold and jewelry cases for you to place deep inside your bank or treasury
The bars of gold and stacks of cash require gold and silver to create respectively and dissassemble 1:1 to return their respective resources
The Jewelry and Gem boxes function as deep storages for jewelry and gems respectively
Commissioned by Starfoth Coded by DimonSever000 Art by Nelson Arts
